titleStmt.title: SII 31.18: original edition by C. A. Padmanabha Sastri and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 18. (A.R. No. B 302 of 1937.) BHAṬṬIPRŌLU, REPALLE TALUK, GUNTUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: Pillar in the mukhamaṇḍapa of the Viṭṭhalēśvara temple.
The date expressed in chronogram (raś-abḍhi-mārga-śasi Māgha Dumdhubi) i.e., Śaka 1149, Māgha. The cyclic year is Duṁdhubi. The date of the record corresponds to 1157 A.D. January-February.

Damaged. It records the gift of a perpetual lamp to the temple of Viṭṭiśvaradēva, also known as Vishṇuvardhnēvaramu at Bhaṭṭiprōlu by the chief S6ō[chō]ḍa Goṅka for the merit of his parents. He is also stated to have gifted one more perpetual lamp for his own merit.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīramaṇī sakala dinmukha pūritasita
kīrttidhanyuṁ buṇyōdayavistāruvariya
ṁcuṁ bāyakakōri kulōttuṁga cōḍagōṁkka
narēṁdrunu . śrīvāllabhyāmunaṁdu viṣṇuvijayau
tsēdaṁbunaṁbottu dayaprati
balaṁ badādi varniṁturaga
ṇyapuṇya prabhāvōnna
tunuṁ . vāma nekkucuṁ
vāli cāya mahīvala
yamiṁtayu vipra rāghavuṁbōlena
gaṇyamai tanarupuṇyacaritra namaṁbudūlagā
dōleṁbracanḍamaṇḍalika dhūrjaṭi soḍayagō
ṁkkaṇḍunnatini bhujavidatāri maṇḍalika bhu(bhū)

sa(sā)radhirasābdhi mārgaśaśisaṁkhya śakā
bdamuluppaṁbuṇyavistaramagu mā
ghamāsamunaṁ dallikiṁ daṁḍriki dhamma 9
mattarōttamuga bhaṭṭiprōla sukṛtāsdhitina
ppina viṣṇuvarddhanēśvaramuna nilipe dīpamu budha
stuti nārā(ra)vitārakaṁbugānu . viśva mahīlalāma
manaviśrutinoppina bhaṭṭiprōli viṭṭēśvara dēvumrō
maṟēyaṁcanakunu sukṛtōdayaṁbugā śāśvada
khaṁḍadīpamu viśaṁkuṇḍu goṁkaṁḍu nilipe nitya
vai(mai) śāśvata lakṣminādinasu caṁdra dhārādhara tārakaṁbugānu .
Digital edition of SII 31.18 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
